goal: finite_set_sum[Pair[T, U], A](product, f) = finite_set_sum[Pair[T, U], A](listed, f)
rhs = sum[A](map[Pair[T, U], A](list_pair_product[T, U](left, right), f))
finite_set_sum[Pair[T, U], A](finite_set_product[T, U](fs_from_list[T](left), fs_from_list[U](right)), f) = rhs
finite_set_sum[Pair[T, U], A](finite_set_product[T, U](fs_from_list[T](left), fs_from_list[U](right)), f) = sum[A](map[Pair[T, U], A](list_pair_product[T, U](left, right), f))
